utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 required items in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now verify if each is fully specified with required details: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided but not specific with year; still dates are specific (April 15-19) – acceptable as specific dates. 3) transportation: requires flight details with costs; only type and a lump-sum cost (€480) are given, no flight details (airline names, times, routes). Not fully specified. 4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs; name and cost provided (Tranquil Inn, €500). Fully specified. 5) activities: requires selected activities with costs; three activities listed but costs are blank; not fully specified. 6) additional_services: any extra services with costs; includes restaurant_budget (€400) and total_activities_cost (€220). Provided, though activities individual costs missing, but this item itself includes costs; considered specified. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown; only a single total (€1600) given without breakdown math; partial. The prompt expects “complete cost breakdown,” which is not provided. Count fully specified: destination (1), travel_dates (2), accommodation (3), additional_services (4). Transportation, activities, total_budget are not fully specified. So 4/7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item from the final package to the corresponding ground-truth rating. The package includes: destination Prague, transportation 'Flights (Standard Airlines, Economy Class)', accommodation 'Tranquil Inn', and activities: Prague Zoo, Science Museum for Kids, City Walking Tour. From ground truth: Prague, Czech Republic has rating 4. Transportation category 'standard_airlines' -> 'Economy Class' has rating 6. Accommodation 'Tranquil Inn' has rating 4. Activities: 'City Walking Tour' exists with rating 9. 'Prague Zoo' and 'Science Museum for Kids' are not present in the ground-truth activities list, so they cannot be mapped and should be omitted.
